title: Add config validator module with tests
description: Create src/utils/configValidator.ts that validates kody.config.json fields including the noCompose?: boolean flag, using the discriminated union Result pattern from src/middleware/validation.ts. Co-locate tests in src/utils/configValidator.test.ts following the vitest describe/it/expect conventions from src/middleware/validation.test.ts.

existing_patterns.description: Discriminated union Result pattern: { ok: true, value } | { ok: false, errors } for explicit error handling
vitest describe/it/expect test conventions with input/output validation coverage
